instruction: Open the 083 capture row before editing any OBM follow-up evidence fields.
instruction_zh: 先打开 083 capture row，再编辑任何 OBM follow-up 证据字段。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain source evidence, an old-catalog confirmation, a holding or collection match, a formal assignment, or a decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Open the 074 queue row, the 075 review-log draft, and all cited route files before recording any availability status.
instruction_zh: 记录任何 availability 状态前，先打开 074 queue row、075 review-log draft 和全部引用的 route files。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain source evidence, an old-catalog confirmation, a holding or collection match, a formal assignment, or a decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Verify the source-register, download-manifest, and download-log rows before copying any access-boundary status.
instruction_zh: 复制任何 access-boundary 状态前，先核对 source-register、download-manifest 和 download-log 行。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain source evidence, an old-catalog confirmation, a holding or collection match, a formal assignment, or a decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record only whether access-profile metadata is available from the reviewed route evidence.
instruction_zh: 只记录经复核 route evidence 中是否可获得 access-profile metadata。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain source evidence, an old-catalog confirmation, a holding or collection match, a formal assignment, or a decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record only whether staged abbreviation metadata is available from the reviewed route evidence.
instruction_zh: 只记录经复核 route evidence 中是否可获得已暂存的 abbreviation metadata。
caution: Checklist item only. It does not contain source evidence, an old-catalog confirmation, a holding or collection match, a formal assignment, or a decipherment conclusion.

instruction: Record only route-file availability and access-boundary status, not source-table import or catalog confirmation.
